Bitmap data and definitions for display images and driver implementation for the Sharp LS013B7DH01 display.

## Folders
- **[resources](resources/README.md)**: Bitmap data and definitions for display images including "dead face," empty bar, error URL, hex digits, and Pebble logo.

## Files
- **[sharp_ls013b7dh01.c](sharp_ls013b7dh01.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the Sharp LS013B7DH01 display in the Pebble firmware, including initialization, data writing, and error display functions.
